prompt: Single clean logo mark on white background. A bold geometric uppercase P in dark charcoal (#3D3D3D) with rounded corners and uniform thick stroke weight. The bowl is a squared-off D-shape (not a perfect semicircle). Inside the bowl's counter space, in the lower-left area, there is a small solid dot with two concentric arcs radiating toward the upper-right at 45 degrees — like a rotated wifi/signal icon suggesting a ping pulse. The signal icon is proportionally small within the counter with breathing room around it. Flat design, single color, no gradients, no text. Just ONE logo centered on white. Generate slight variations in the P's proportions and signal icon sizing.
